description: Kai's phone buzzes. A text from Dara, his sister's closest friend: "She told me she wrote to you. I know you'll do the right thing." The text is warm, not accusatory — but it means someone else knows, and someone else is watching.

successor_situation_stub.description: Kai's avoidance is no longer private. Someone outside the kitchen knows the letter exists and expects a response. Delay now has a social cost it did not have before.
